# Background on low density minimizers {#sec-low-density-minimizers}

TBA

- the quest for lower density
- recent progress [@pellow2023efficient;@mod-mini;@ocmm;@finimizers;@greedymini;@10-minimizers]
- see Ragnar's thesis [@ragnar-thesis]
- practical impact of lower density: fewer queries, less space usage (e.g. in K2Rmini, Deacon, SSHash or KFC)
